text:
Vatanen is a minor supporting character who appears exclusively in The Sacred Star Of Milos. He is a tanned-skinned, brown-haired, and brown-eyed man with a scar on his left side of his mouth.

Role in the Film

Vatanen's role in the film is very minor, only having a few lines of dialogue. He explains to Julia Crichton that he and the people of the Slums would be willing to sacrifice themselves to liberate and save their people. He is never seen again after this scene nor is he mentioned.
